{"society_power": 6.0, "state_power": 7.0, "society_change": 0.0, "state_change": 1.0, "key_event": "1925 Constitution and Ib\u00e1\u00f1ez centralize state authority", "reasoning": "Society mobilized strongly (labor, middle class, Alessandri) but ended the period repressed under Ib\u00e1\u00f1ez, netting no lasting gain in durable checks; meanwhile the state reorganized and centralized via the 1925 Constitution, military intervention, and social laws, tilting toward a despotic Leviathan."}
